auth_notes: Most modern industry-standard APIs require OAuth2 for user-scoped data or Bearer Tokens (API Keys) for server-to-server communication. n8n requires manual configuration of 'Generic OAuth2' credentials for the HTTP Request node.
rate_limits: Typically 10-50 requests per second (standard for RESTful SaaS)
gotchas: Pagination logic (Link headers or offset/limit) must be manually implemented in n8n loops
Rate limit handling (429 errors) requires manual retry logic in the HTTP node
Webhook verification signatures often require a Function node to validate HMAC
research_notes: As 'Industry standard' refers to generic RESTful patterns rather than a specific software, this analysis covers the standard HTTP Request node approach. Integration involves configuring the HTTP Request node with appropriate headers and body parameters, and using the Webhook node for inbound events.

effort_recommendation.rationale: As 'Industry standard' refers to generic RESTful patterns rather than a specific software, this analysis covers the standard HTTP Request node approach. Integration involves configuring the HTTP Request node with appropriate headers and body parameters, and using the Webhook node for inbound events.
